name: Baldur
description:
*Past* 🐉: The tragedy of Baldur. ***Connected to: Lokate***

“Very well,” Helara answered after careful deliberation. “Lokate Odinsdottir, you may take your sister with you to the land of the living. However, you must lead and Baldur will follow. Trust that she is with you, for if you dare to look back, Baldur will stay in the Beyond.” “Do we have a deal?”

“For my sister?” Lokate, still young and barely grown into her scales, replied determinedly. “I’d do anything!”
creator: Pinkloftwing
